_comment: Configuration for the CACC ACI desktop automation agent. Edit these values to match your ACI installation.
_comment_window: To find the exact window title, start ACI, then run: GET http://localhost:5180/list-windows
_comment_verify: verify_insertion reads the field back after insert to confirm success. Disable if it causes slowness.
_comment_screenshot: screenshot_on_failure saves a PNG to desktop_agent/screenshots/ whenever an insertion fails. Requires pillow (pip install pillow). Set false to disable.
_comment_phase2: Phase 2 settings — label-aware TX32 targeting and learned targets persistence.
_comment_learned: learned_targets_enabled: after each successful insertion, save the winning strategy to learned_targets.json so future attempts reuse it first.
_comment_tx32_content: TX32 controls taller than this (px) are treated as editable content areas.
_comment_tx32_title: TX32 controls shorter than this (px) are treated as label/title strips.
_comment_tx32_width: TX32 controls narrower than this (px) are ignored (scrollbars, decorations).
_comment_tab_wait: Milliseconds to wait after clicking a section tab before discovering TX32 controls.
_comment_probe: If true, run a dry-run probe before every insert to log TX32 candidates. Useful for debugging. Disable in production for speed.
